message:
fix(plan): add serde defaults to compensation fields and fix empty commit guard

Add #[serde(default)] to no_compensation_count and step_results in
TxCompensationReport for deserialization resilience. Fix
reconstruct_tx_resume_state to only trigger compensation when
committed_step_ids is non-empty, preventing spurious compensation
when all steps failed before any were committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
